mapper.select: SELECT u.user_name AS student_number, u.real_name AS student_name, c.class_name AS class_name, SUM(CASE WHEN al.status_id = 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normal, SUM(CASE WHEN al.status_id = 11 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late, SUM(CASE WHEN al.status_id = 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS early_leave, SUM(CASE WHEN al.status_id = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absent, SUM(CASE WHEN al.status_id = 46 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `LEAVE`, SUM(CASE WHEN al.status_id = 47 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS makeup, SUM(CASE WHEN al.status_id = 48 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_card FROM aoa_user AS u LEFT JOIN aoa_class AS c ON u.class_id = c.class_id LEFT JOIN aoa_attends_list AS al ON u.user_id = al.attends_user_id WHERE u.entrance_date = #{searchDate} GROUP BY u.user_id, u.user_name, c.class_name;
